title: White and Black World
description: A minecraft texture pack that makes all textures pale black and white.
body:
This is a minecraft texture pack that makes all textures white and black, basically, gray scale. This also keeps the alpha values (transperency) of textures, so textures like water and leaves, you will still be able to see though like normally.
